creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
No.  I prefer "and request maintainership" in the title.

I've changed your titles quite a few times and those changes serve as examples.  I assume you got notices showing the title change.  So ideally you would notice these changes which show 1) what not to do and 2) what to do instead.

but in this case I explicitly pointed it out.



"[maintainer]" means the current maintainer opened the PR, not somebody that wants to be a maintainer.  It's a way of establishing credibility quickly.
